data.title: Magyar Bancorp Reports Strong 2024 Financial Performance
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest announcement is out from Magyar Bancorp ( (MGYR) ).

Magyar Bancorp, Inc. announced a strong financial performance for 2024, highlighting a 5.5% increase in deposits, 12% loan growth, and a rise in earnings per share to $1.23. The company also reported enhanced shareholder returns through increased dividend payments and an active stock buyback program, while being recognized as a high-performing bank with a 5-star Bauer Financial rating and inclusion in the 2024 KBW Honor Roll. The company’s commitment to growth and enhanced liquidity is underscored by strategic expansions, such as opening a new branch in Martinsville and closing its Bridgewater office.

More about Magyar Bancorp

Magyar Bancorp, Inc. is a New Jersey-based financial institution that operates through its subsidiary, Magyar Bank, a chartered savings bank founded in 1922. The company, listed on NASDAQ under the symbol MGYR, offers community banking services through a network of branches in New Jersey, managing $1 billion in assets, $805 million in loans, and $849 million in deposits as of December 31, 2024.

YTD Price Performance: 1.31%

Average Trading Volume: 4,012

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $94.6M

data.description:

SigmaRoc ( (GB:SRC) ) has provided an announcement.

SigmaRoc PLC, a company involved in manufacturing and construction materials, has reported a change in its voting rights structure. Rettig Oy Ab, based in Helsinki, Finland, has reduced its voting rights in SigmaRoc from 4.5% to 3.97% as of February 18, 2025. This change may impact the company’s decision-making process and influence from significant shareholders.

data.title: Dividend Select 15 Corp. Declares March 2025 Dividend
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Dividend Select 15 ( (TSE:DS) ) has shared an update.

Dividend Select 15 Corp. has announced a monthly dividend of $0.05667 per Equity share, payable on March 10, 2025, to shareholders on record as of February 28, 2025. The dividend is determined by applying a 10% annualized rate on the volume-weighted average market price of the shares, maintaining a stable yield for its investors, and marking a total of $10.88 per share distributed since inception.

More about Dividend Select 15

Dividend Select 15 Corp. focuses on investing in a diverse portfolio of 15 Canadian companies, chosen from a broader universe of 20 prominent dividend-yielding stocks. The company’s primary goal is to provide consistent dividend income to its shareholders by investing in high-yield Canadian stocks across various industries.

data.title: Coca-Cola Europacific Partners Executives Acquire Shares to Strengthen Leadership Alignment
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An update from Coca-Cola Europacific Partners ( (CCEP) ) is now available.

Coca-Cola Europacific Partners announced the acquisition of ordinary shares by several of its key executives under the UK Share Plan. The transactions involve multiple senior figures, including the Chief Financial Officer, Chief Information Officer, and General Counsel, indicating a significant engagement in company equity. This move reflects a strategic step in aligning the interests of the company’s leadership with its shareholders and might enhance the company’s market positioning by reinforcing executive commitment.

More about Coca-Cola Europacific Partners

Coca-Cola Europacific Partners plc operates in the beverage industry, providing a wide range of non-alcoholic drinks. As one of the largest independent Coca-Cola bottlers, the company serves markets across Europe and the Asia-Pacific region, focusing on delivering Coca-Cola branded beverages and other leading brands to consumers.

data.title: ICTS International Faces Appeal in Dutch Supreme Court
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

ICTS International ( (ICTSF) ) has shared an update.

On February 20, 2025, ICTS International N.V., a company involved in security and surveillance services, reported that a minority shareholder has filed an appeal with the Dutch Supreme Court. This appeal challenges the decision made by the Enterprise Chamber of the Amsterdam Court of Appeal on November 14, 2024, which fully dismissed the requests of the minority shareholder. The outcome of this appeal could have significant implications for ICTS International’s operations and its relationship with shareholders.

More about ICTS International

data.title: Brooks Macdonald Announces Shareholding by Artemis and Strategic Move to LSE Main Market
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Brooks Macdonald ( (GB:BRK) ) just unveiled an update.

Brooks Macdonald has announced that Artemis Investment Management LLP holds a 3.17% stake in the company’s ordinary shares as of February 19, 2025. This development comes ahead of Brooks Macdonald’s anticipated move from AIM to the Main Market of the London Stock Exchange in March 2025, a strategic shift expected to enhance the company’s market presence and appeal to a broader range of investors.

More about Brooks Macdonald

Brooks Macdonald Group plc is a prominent UK-based provider of wealth management services, established in 1991 and publicly traded on AIM since 2005. The company is recognized for its innovative financial solutions, including Managed Portfolio Services and bespoke income solutions, catering to clients’ evolving financial needs throughout their lives.

Dongfang Electric ( (HK:1072) ) just unveiled an update.

Dongfang Electric Corporation Limited announced a supplemental agreement to its Profit Forecast Compensation Agreement with DEC Group regarding the proposed acquisition of assets. The company aims to issue A shares to specific investors to raise funds for acquiring equity interests in various subsidiaries. This move is expected to strengthen Dongfang Electric’s asset base and financial performance, with DEC Group providing performance guarantees. The completion of this transaction is anticipated to enhance the company’s industry positioning and investor confidence.

More about Dongfang Electric

Dongfang Electric Corporation Limited operates in the energy equipment manufacturing industry, focusing on the production of power generation equipment, including turbines, boilers, and electric machinery. data.title: Pool Corporation Reports 2024 Financial Results Amid Challenges
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Pool ( (POOL) ) has shared an update.

Pool Corporation reported its 2024 financial results, with net sales of $5.3 billion and operating income of $617.2 million, despite a challenging economic environment. The company saw a 4% decline in net sales compared to 2023, attributed to reduced spending on discretionary products. However, its strategic initiatives, including the expansion of its digital ecosystem and sales centers, helped maintain a solid operating margin. Looking forward to 2025, Pool Corporation anticipates earnings per share to be between $11.08 and $11.58, bolstered by ongoing industry trends and strong operational foundations.

More about Pool

POOLCORP is the world’s largest wholesale distributor of swimming pool and related backyard products, operating 448 sales centers across North America, Europe, and Australia. It distributes over 200,000 products to around 125,000 wholesale customers.
